reference_repo_influences: paper2code: official-repo branch and ambiguity audit
MinerU: parser option for paper source
algorithm_traits: ToolRAG classifier selects relevant tools before examples
multi-step dependency scheduling is out-of-scope for current MAformac

maformac_insertion_points.recommendation: Future spike for D-domain tool subset retrieval before model call.
Future data variants for tool-subset prompts and distractor tools.
Future retrieval-miss and parser-tool-name-miss failure cases.
Keep multi-step planner as spike-only; do not change current single-hop guarded execution.

gate.rationale: Strong MAformac relevance, but official code is not recently code-pushed and multi-step desktop-agent behavior exceeds the current single-hop default-scope route.

residual_risks: Official code may lag the paper or package.
Tool set differs from vehicle D-domain tools.
Reported TinyAgent success rates are not MAformac C6 evidence.
